results.title: Thomas A. Modesto: How to attract candidates with sensible proposals
results.description: I hope Republican voters have taken cognizance of the many problems directly affecting them that their party has taken little interest in solving. Once upon a time, this party stood for fiscal prudence, but that has long been abandoned.
